---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Why would this be useful?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think this could work.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or other context.
